queries.title: Missing Shipment
queries.description: Checks whether a shipment exists for this delivery in shipmentStopDeliveries.

sql_blocks.label: Check Shipment
sql_blocks.sql:
SELECT shipmentNumber
    FROM shipmentStopDeliveries WITH (READUNCOMMITTED)
    WHERE DeliveryNumber = @delivery_number

queries.title: Missing Trailer
queries.description: Checks whether the shipment linked to this delivery has a trailer assigned. Returns ok if no shipment exists.

sql_blocks.label: Check Trailer
sql_blocks.sql:
SELECT s.shipmentNumber, s.trailerid
    FROM shipments s WITH (READUNCOMMITTED)
    WHERE s.shipmentNumber IN (
        SELECT shipmentNumber
        FROM shipmentStopDeliveries WITH (READUNCOMMITTED)
        WHERE DeliveryNumber = @delivery_number
    )

queries.title: Missing Trailer Capacity
queries.description: Checks if the trailer attached to the shipment has a trailer capacity assigned.

sql_blocks.label: Check Trailer Capacity
sql_blocks.sql:
SELECT   s.trailerid
    FROM     shipments AS s WITH (READUNCOMMITTED)
    LEFT JOIN trailers AS t WITH (READUNCOMMITTED) ON s.trailerId = t.trailerId
    LEFT JOIN shipmentStopDeliveries AS ssd WITH (READUNCOMMITTED) ON s.shipmentNumber = ssd.shipmentNumber
    WHERE    ssd.DeliveryNumber = @delivery_number
        AND    (t.trailerCapacity IS NULL OR t.trailerCapacity = 0)
    ORDER BY s.shipmentNumber

queries.title: Missing Delivery Allocations
queries.description: Checks for inventory IDs present in vwInventoryDetails that have no matching record in deliveryallocations.

sql_blocks.label: Check Delivery Allocations
sql_blocks.sql:
SELECT   v.inventoryid
    FROM     vwInventoryDetails AS v WITH (READUNCOMMITTED)
    WHERE    v.exitdeliverynumber = @delivery_number
      AND    NOT EXISTS (
                 SELECT 1
                 FROM   deliveryallocations AS da
                 WHERE  da.inventoryid = v.inventoryid
             )
    ORDER BY v.inventoryid
